debug_info.goal:
S : LightProfinite
inst✝ : Nonempty ↑S.toTop
⊢ Injective (lightToProfinite.obj S)

failed_attempts:
by
    let S_p := lightToProfinite.obj S
    let S_seq (n : ℕ) := lightToProfinite.obj (S.component n)
    let π (n : ℕ) : S_p ⟶ S_seq n := lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n)
    let p (n : ℕ) : S_seq (n+1) ⟶ S_seq n := lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n)
    haveI (n : ℕ) : Finite (S_seq n) := inferInstanceAs (Finite (S.component n))
    haveI : Nonempty (S_seq 0) := Nonempty.map (π 0) inferInstance
    haveI (n : ℕ) : Epi (p n) := (epi_iff_surjective _).mpr (S.surjective_transitionMap n)
    obtain ⟨k0, h_down0⟩ := Injective.factors (g ≫ π 0) f
    have h_step (n : ℕ) (k : Y ⟶ S_seq n) (h_down : f ≫ k = g ≫ π n) :
      ∃ k' : Y ⟶ S_seq (n+1), k' ≫ p n = k ∧ f ≫ k' = g ≫ π (n+1) := by
      have h_comm : f ≫ k = g ≫ π (n+1) ≫ p n := by
        rw [h_down, Category.assoc, ← Functor.map_comp, S.proj_comp_transitionMap]
      exact profinite_key_extension_lemma X Y (S_seq (n+1)) (S_seq n) f (p n) (g ≫ π (n+1)) k h_comm
    let lifts (n : ℕ) := { k : Y ⟶ S_seq n // f ≫ k = g ≫ π n }
    let next (n : ℕ) (k : lifts n) : lifts (n+1) :=
      let ⟨k', hk'⟩ := Classical.choose_spec (h_step n k.1 k.2)
      ⟨k', hk'.2⟩
    let k_seq (n : ℕ) : lifts n := Nat.rec ⟨k0, h_down0⟩ next n
    have h_up (n : ℕ) : (k_seq (n+1)).1 ≫ p n = (k_seq n).1 :=
      (Classical.choose_spec (h_step n (k_seq n).1 (k_seq n).2)).1
    let D := lightToProfinite.map S.diagram
    let C : Cone D :=
      { pt := Y, π := NatTrans.ofOpSequence (fun n ↦ (k_seq n).1) (fun n ↦ (h_up n).symm) }
    have hS : IsLimit (lightToProfinite.mapCone S.asLimit.cone) :=
      isLimitOfPreserves lightToProfinite S.asLimit.isLimit
    use hS.lift C
    apply hS.hom_ext
    intro j
    rw [Category.assoc, hS.fac C j]
    exact (k_seq j.unop).2
